message:
docs: fix remaining stale comment and test names referencing lazy rebuild

- apply_blocked_cache_refresh_plan: update Deferred comment to say
  "signals reads to compute in-memory" instead of "trigger a lazy rebuild"
- Rename two tests from *_for_lazy_refresh to *_reads_compute_in_memory
  to accurately describe what they verify (#216)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
